hooks.command:
input=$(cat); cmd=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.tool_input.command // ""' 2>/dev/null || echo ''); if echo "$cmd" | grep -qE 'prisma migrate reset|DROP (TABLE|DATABASE)|DROP SCHEMA'; then printf '
⚠  BLOCKED: Destructive database command intercepted.
Run this manually in your terminal if intentional.
' >&2; exit 2; fi

input=$(cat); file=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // ""' 2>/dev/null || echo ''); if echo "$file" | grep -qE '\.env$'; then printf '\n⚠  Warning: Editing .env directly. Commit changes to .env.example instead.\n'; fi

input=$(cat); file=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // ""' 2>/dev/null || echo ''); if echo "$file" | grep -qE '\.(ts|tsx|js|jsx|css|json)$'; then cd /Users/rahulshome/Documents/code/expenseiq && npx prettier --write "$file" --log-level warn 2>/dev/null || true; fi

input=$(cat); file=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // ""' 2>/dev/null || echo ''); if echo "$file" | grep -q 'schema\.prisma'; then echo '⚙  Schema changed — regenerating Prisma client...'; cd /Users/rahulshome/Documents/code/expenseiq && npx prisma generate 2>&1 | tail -4; fi

input=$(cat); output=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.tool_response // ""' 2>/dev/null || echo ''); if echo "$output" | grep -qE 'PASS|FAIL|Tests:|passed|failed'; then echo '--- Test summary ---'; echo "$output" | grep -E '(PASS|FAIL|✓|✗|Tests:|passed|failed|Duration)' | head -8; echo '---'; fi

cd /Users/rahulshome/Documents/code/expenseiq && echo '--- TypeScript check ---' && result=$(npx tsc --noEmit 2>&1); if [ -z "$result" ]; then echo '✓ No type errors'; else echo "$result" | head -25; echo '--- end ---'; fi
osascript -e 'display notification "Claude Code needs your attention" with title "ExpenseIQ" sound name "Ping"' 2>/dev/null || true
